agtech.title: The engineering behind MetaBuilderPRO
agtech.p1: AGTech is a software engineering and innovation lab focused on developing high-performance MetadataTechs.
agtech.p2: Our mission is to build the invisible technological infrastructure that allows complex ecosystems to operate with maximum efficiency, security, and data intelligence.
agtech.p3: We combine robust architectures with user-centric design to deliver tools that truly transform the operational routine.
agtech.cta_label: WANT TO ELEVATE THE TECHNOLOGY LEVEL OF YOUR PROJECT?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.item1_desc: When using login or filling in your BYODB credentials, we only collect essential data (name, email, and infrastructure keys) for authentication and system technical operation purposes.
privacy.item2_desc: Your data is used exclusively to authenticate your access, synchronize your records privately within your own structure (Supabase), and allow interaction with the engine's Artificial Intelligence.
privacy.item3_desc: Important: Your API keys and sensitive metadata are managed locally by the CLI Agent and are never sent to our central servers. This ensures total sovereignty over your data.
privacy.item4_desc: We only use strictly necessary cookies to keep your session active and save your theme preferences (Dark Mode). All communication is encrypted via TLS 1.3.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.item1_desc: By accessing this application, you agree to comply with these terms of service and all applicable laws regarding development and data protection (LGPD).
terms.item2_desc: MetaBuilderPRO is an automation and technical aid tool. Architecture decisions and final implementation must be mandatory reviewed by a responsible human developer.
terms.item3_desc: Access is personal and non-transferable. The user is solely responsible for the security of their API keys and database credentials (Bring Your Own Database).
terms.item4_desc: All MetaBuilderPRO design and branding are owned by AGTech. The code generated by the engine in your infrastructure remains in your possession and responsibility.

hero.subtitle: The ultimate engine for generating dynamic, database-driven CRUD applications without ever touching physical file generation. Connect your enterprise DB securely.

features.dynamic_desc: Introspect your database and map schemas in real-time. No manual mapping required.
features.nocode_desc: Run your entire CRUD via metadata engine dynamically. Changes reflect instantly.
features.enterprise_desc: Local CLI agents to connect to on-premise databases (Oracle, SAP) securely.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Account settings
profile.avatar_hint: Upload a JPG, PNG or GIF image.

dashboard.manage_workspaces: Manage your workspaces and data architectures.
dashboard.create_environment: Create an environment for your company.
dashboard.slug_hint: This will be the public address for your projects.
dashboard.delete_desc: All projects and data in this environment will be permanently removed.

projects.title: Projects in
projects.subtitle: Here you manage all applications and database connections of this workspace. Each project can have its own CLI Agent and metadata structure.
projects.delete_project_desc: All models and data of this project will be permanently removed.
projects.status_desc: Determine if the project is accessible.
projects.use_cases_subtitle: All published interfaces for this project.
projects.delete_view_desc: This action will permanently remove the interface. Database data will not be affected.

studio.title: MetaBuilder Studio
studio.subtitle: Configure your application screens. Choose synchronized tables and define how data should be displayed to your users.

config.title: Configuring Screen
config.db_fields_desc: Select which columns of {table} should appear in this View.
config.add_virtual_field_desc: Create calculated fields or custom action buttons.

auth.title: Identity and Access (Consumers)
auth.strategy_desc: Choose how final users will log in to your application.
auth.managed_desc: MetaBuilder manages users in an isolated database. Fast and easy.
auth.database_desc: The CLI Agent validates login against YOUR synchronized users table.
auth.ldap_desc: Native corporate integration. Validation via client's Active Directory.
auth.managed_ready_desc: We will automatically create the table and login/registration APIs. No additional configuration is required.
auth.ldap_conn_desc: The CLI Agent will use these credentials to try to authenticate on the company's local network.

projects.connection_desc: Secure tunnel running via CLI Agent.

app.project_inactive_desc: This application has been temporarily disabled by the workspace administrator.
